title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system architecture that minimizes LLM calls by using deterministic code and callback mechanisms to handle tasks better solved through algorithms. The example demonstrates 1,000 marathon-planning agents making zero LLM calls by applying the Spine and Sprout algorithm for route planning instead of delegating to the language model.
